name: data-pipelines
label: Data Pipelines
description: Seed concepts for a data-pipelines tenant focused on lineage, schema drift, observability, and pipeline reliability.

agents.label: Clio
agents.content: Research agent for data systems. Tracks lineage, drift, and source quality.

values.label: Lineage
values.content: Every output should be traceable to its inputs, transformations, and owners.

values.label: Reliability
values.content: Pipelines fail silently more often than loudly. Explicit contracts and monitoring are required.

capabilities.label: Schema Audit
capabilities.content: Detect and report schema drift and contract violations across pipeline stages.

capabilities.label: Lineage Tracing
capabilities.content: Trace the origin and transformations of any data artifact.

concepts.label: Data Lineage
concepts.content: A directed graph of data flows from source to consumer, including transformations, owners, and quality signals.

concepts.label: Schema Drift
concepts.content: Uncontrolled changes to data shape or semantics that break downstream consumers.

concepts.label: Pipeline Observability
concepts.content: Monitoring not just whether a job succeeded, but whether its outputs are timely, complete, and valid.
